reference: I have had a recurrent yeast infection lately each time I have been intimate with my husband. I have never had a yeast infection in my forty-seven years of life, so I am very concerned about what is going on. Although we are separated, I know that I have not been with anyone else, and he says that he has not, and I believe him. So if multiple partners are not the case, what else could it be?
text: I have had a recurrent yeast infection lately, each time I have been intimate with my husband. I have never had a yeast infection in my 47 years of life, so I am very concerned about what is going on. Although we are separated, I know that I have not been with anyone else, and he says that he has not, and I believe him. So if multiple partners are not the case, what else could it be?
